family_summary: A short but highly heterogeneous interstate war fought on Egyptian/Sinai, Jordanian/West Bank-Jerusalem, and Syrian/Golan fronts from 5 to 10 June 1967. The war's very short duration and sharply different theaters make front-level episode splitting necessary for denominator construction.
notes: Palestinian civilians are central to the West Bank/East Jerusalem and Gaza theaters even though the conflict family is coded here through the main state belligerents. Baseline DR uses direct violent deaths only.
